records.question: Which departments named ECE are located in room 105 of the Barton building, belong to the EN division, have a phone number at most 7033, and include members whose appointment type is exactly Primary?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
WHERE department.dname = 'ECE' AND department.dphone <= 7033 AND department.room = '105' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.building = 'Barton'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DNO FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN Member_of AS T2 ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO WHERE T1.DName = 'ECE' AND T1.Room = '105' AND T1.Building = 'Barton' AND T1.Division = 'EN' AND T1.DPhone <= 7033 AND T2.Appt_Type = 'Primary'

records.question: Which departments have the name 'ECE' and division 'EN' and also have courses held on 'W' days and have minor_in records?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.dname = 'ECE' AND department.division = 'EN' AND course.days = 'W'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DNO FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN Course AS T2 ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO INNER JOIN Minor_in AS T3 ON T1.DNO = T3.DNO WHERE T1.DName = 'ECE' AND T1.Division = 'EN' AND T2.Days = 'W'

records.question: Which departments are located in room 245 of the Gilman building and have a phone number exactly 7508?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
WHERE department.room = '245' AND department.building = 'Gilman' AND department.dphone = 7508
records.pred_sql: SELECT DNO FROM Department WHERE Room = '245' AND Building = 'Gilman' AND DPhone = 7508

records.question: Which departments located in room 245 have students minoring in them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
JOIN student ON minor_in.stuid = student.stuid
WHERE department.room = '245'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT T1.DNO
FROM Department AS T1
INNER JOIN Minor_in AS T2
  ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO
WHERE
  T1.Room = '245'

records.question: Which departments have members whose appointment type is exactly Primary?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
WHERE member_of.appt_type = 'Primary'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.DNO FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN Member_of AS T2 ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO WHERE T2.Appt_Type = 'Primary'

records.question: Which departments named ECE in division EN have room 105, a phone number of at least 7033, offer courses exactly 2 hours long on MTW, and include members with a Primary appointment type?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE department.dphone >= 7033 AND course.hours = '2' AND department.division = 'EN' AND department.room = '105' AND department.dname = 'ECE' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Primary' AND course.days = 'MTW'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DNO
FROM Department
WHERE DName = 'ECE'
  AND Division = 'EN'
  AND Room = '105'
  AND DPhone >= 7033
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Course
    WHERE Course.DNO = Department.DNO
      AND Course.Days = 'MTW'
      AND (
        (JULIANDAY('2000-01-01 ' || SUBSTR(Course.Hours, INSTR(Course.Hours, '-') + 1)) -
         JULIANDAY('2000-01-01 ' || SUBSTR(Course.Hours, 1, INSTR(Course.Hours, '-') - 1))) * 24
      ) = 2
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM Member_of
    WHERE Member_of.DNO = Department.DNO
      AND Member_of.Appt_Type = 'Primary'
  )

records.question: Which departments in building NEB with room 224 and division EN have a phone number of at least 8577 and offer courses worth exactly 3 credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
WHERE department.dphone >= 8577 AND department.division = 'EN' AND course.credits = 3 AND department.room = '224' AND department.building = 'NEB'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.DNO FROM Department AS T1 INNER JOIN Course AS T2 ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO WHERE T1.Building = 'NEB' AND T1.Room = '224' AND T1.Division = 'EN' AND T1.DPhone >= 8577 AND T2.Credits = 3

records.question: Which departments have a phone number that is exactly 7399?
records.gold_sql:

WHERE department.dphone = 7399
records.pred_sql: SELECT DNO FROM Department WHERE DPhone = 7399

records.question: What departments in division AS have a phone number of at least 7119 and are associated with both courses and minors?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dno = course.dno
JOIN minor_in ON department.dno = minor_in.dno
WHERE department.division = 'AS' AND department.dphone >= 7119
records.pred_sql: SELECT DNO FROM Department WHERE Division = 'AS' AND DPhone >= 7119 AND DNO IN ( SELECT DNO FROM Course ) AND DNO IN ( SELECT DNO FROM Minor_in )

records.question: Which departments are located in building Krieger, division AS, room 381, have a department phone number at most 7119, and include faculty member Salzberg with a phone number at most 2641 who has a Secondary appointment?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dno FROM department
JOIN member_of ON department.dno = member_of.dno
JOIN faculty ON member_of.facid = faculty.facid
WHERE department.building = 'Krieger' AND department.division = 'AS' AND department.room = '381' AND member_of.appt_type = 'Secondary' AND faculty.phone <= 2641 AND faculty.lname = 'Salzberg' AND department.dphone <= 7119
records.pred_sql:
SELECT T1.DNO
FROM Department AS T1
INNER JOIN Member_of AS T2
  ON T1.DNO = T2.DNO
INNER JOIN Faculty AS T3
  ON T2.FacID = T3.FacID
WHERE
  T1.Building = 'Krieger' AND T1.Division = 'AS' AND T1.Room = '381' AND T1.DPhone <= 7119 AND T3.Lname = 'Salzberg' AND T3.Phone <= 2641 AND T2.Appt_Type = 'Secondary'
